name: Sherry Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a cookie sheet and set aside.
2. In a 3-quart heavy saucepan over low heat, stir together sugar, sherry, and salt until the sugar dissolves.
3. Bring to a boil; cover and continue boiling for 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Uncover and cook without stirring until the mixture reaches 236°F (soft-ball stage) on a candy thermometer.
5. Remove from heat and stir in walnuts and cinnamon until the mixture becomes cloudy.
6. Turn out onto the prepared cookie sheet and let cool.
7. Separate the walnuts with two forks. Store in an airtight container at room temperature.
